posts.text:
Grateful to hear from and speak with so many constituents at last night’s telephone town hall.

There are a lot of very real challenges facing our country, but more and more Americans are rejecting Donald Trump’s dark vision for America.

We have to keep fighting and speaking out.

Video

We are talking about affordability because there is a cost of living crisis in America.

Video

“Public sentiment is everything. With public sentiment, nothing can fail; without it nothing can succeed." - Abraham Lincoln


The Associated Press (@AP)

BREAKING: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem will be replaced with GOP Senator Markwayne Mullin, President Trump says. apnews.com/article/trump-hom…




— https://nitter.net/AP/status/2029632671630950534#m

The reason the overwhelming majority of Americans have turned against Secretary Noem is because she engaged in corruption, strayed from her mission, and abused her power.

Video

It’s not just that the Administration isn’t answering questions about Iran. 

They’re lying.

Video

DHS Secretary Noem wouldn't commit to not doing ICE raids near drop-off zones or schools.

Video

No congressional authorization = no legal war. The Constitution is clear.

The Framers had Congress decide on war to protect Americans and force the President to be answerable to the public.

Video

It’s an absolute dereliction of duty that the Trump Administration didn’t have a plan in place to get Americans out of danger.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Q: Did the Trump administration fumble in terms of telling Americans to evacuate too late?

THUNE: I think you will see a ramped up, intensified effort to ensure Americans are being evacuated from the region

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2028926893748031643#m

FactPost (@factpostnews)

RFK Jr. suggests Americans can more easily afford groceries if they start eating liver instead of beef:

"Most of the cheap cuts of meat are very inexpensive. ... You can buy liver or the cheap cuts."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/factpostnews/status/2027428889102880838#m

We have a cost of living emergency in America.
 
And what was Donald Trump's response? He mocked Americans and the term "affordability."

Video

If Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche doesn’t want to be complicit in a cover up then he should appoint a special counsel.

thehill.com/homenews/house/5…
